mapper.select:
SELECT info.busi_id, info.busi_no, info.app_code, info.right_ver, info.tree_type, info.create_user, info.create_time, info.update_user, info.update_time, info.is_deleted, info.create_user_name, info.update_user_name, info.org_code, info.org_name, app.app_name AS appTypeName, app.equipment_id FROM ecm_busi_info info LEFT JOIN ecm_app_def app AS on info.app_code = app.app_code
info.is_deleted = 0
AND info.busi_id IN
#{item}
SELECT * FROM ecm_busi_info WHERE busi_id = #{busiId}

update.foreach: UPDATE ecm_busi_info SET busi_no=#{item.busiNo} , is_deleted = 1 WHERE busi_id=#{item.busiId}

mapper.select:
SELECT ebi.app_code AS appCode, efi.create_user AS createUser, efi.create_user_name AS createUserName, DATE_FORMAT(efi.create_time,
'%Y-%m-%d'
'%Y-%m'
'%Y'
'%Y-%m-%d'
) AS createDate, COUNT(*) AS fileNumber FROM ecm_busi_info ebi LEFT JOIN ecm_file_info efi ON ebi.busi_id = efi.busi_id
efi.create_time BETWEEN #{ecmStatisticsDTO.startDate} AND #{ecmStatisticsDTO.endDate}
AND efi.create_user IN
#{item}
GROUP BY efi.create_user, DATE_FORMAT(efi.create_time,
'%Y-%m-%d'
'%Y-%m'
'%Y'
'%Y-%m-%d'
), efi.create_user_name, ebi.app_code

SELECT info.busi_id FROM ecm_busi_info info
info.is_deleted = 0
and info.busi_no like '%' || #{busiInfoVo.busiNo} || '%'
and info.right_ver = #{busiInfoVo.rightVer}
AND info.status IN
#{item}
and info.app_code in
#{item}
AND info.org_code IN
#{item}
and info.busi_id in
#{item}
and info.create_user_name like '%' || #{busiInfoVo.createUser} || '%'
and info.update_user_name like '%' || #{busiInfoVo.updateUser} || '%'
AND info.create_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeStart}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AND info.create_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeEnd}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss')
AND info.update_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeStart}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AND info.update_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeEnd}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss')
ORDER BY info.create_time DESC

SELECT info.busi_id, info.busi_no, info.create_user_name, def.app_name as appTypeName, info.create_time, def.app_code FROM ecm_busi_info info left join ecm_app_def def on info.app_code = def.app_code
info.is_deleted = 0
and info.busi_no like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{busiInfoVo.busiNo}),'%')
AND (
info.org_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
)
and info.right_ver = #{busiInfoVo.rightVer}
and info.app_code in
#{item}
and info.busi_id in
#{item}
and info.create_user_name like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{busiInfoVo.createUser}),'%')
and info.update_user_name like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{busiInfoVo.updateUser}),'%')
AND info.create_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND info.create_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND info.update_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND info.update_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY info.create_time DESC

SELECT count(*) FROM ecm_busi_info info LEFT JOIN ecm_app_def def ON info.app_code = def.app_code
info.is_deleted = 0
AND info.busi_no LIKE '%' || #{busiInfoVo.busiNo} || '%'
AND (
info.org_code LIKE '%' || #{code} || '%'
)
AND info.right_ver = #{busiInfoVo.rightVer}
AND info.app_code IN
#{item}
AND info.busi_id IN
#{item}
AND info.create_user_name LIKE '%' || #{busiInfoVo.createUser} || '%'
AND info.update_user_name LIKE '%' || #{busiInfoVo.updateUser} || '%'
AND info.create_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND info.create_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND info.update_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND info.update_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT count(*) FROM ecm_busi_info info
info.is_deleted = 0
and info.busi_no like '%' || #{busiInfoVo.busiNo} || '%'
AND info.status IN
#{item}
and info.app_code in
#{item}
AND info.org_code IN
#{item}
and info.busi_id in
#{item}
and info.create_user_name like '%' || #{busiInfoVo.createUser} || '%'
and info.update_user_name like '%' || #{busiInfoVo.updateUser} || '%'
AND info.create_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeStart}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AND info.create_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.createTimeEnd}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss')
AND info.update_time >= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeStart}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AND info.update_time <= TO_DATE(#{busiInfoVo.updateTimeEnd}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss')
select * from ecm_busi_info where busi_id = #{busiId}

update.foreach: update ecm_busi_info set busi_no=#{item.busiNo} , is_deleted = 1 where busi_id=#{item.busiId}

mapper.select:
SELECT ebi.app_code AS appCode, efi.create_user AS createUser, efi.create_user_name AS createUserName, TO_CHAR(efi.create_time, -- DATE_FORMAT(efi.create_time,
'YYYY-MM-DD'
'YYYY-MM'
'YYYY'
'YYYY-MM-DD'
) AS createDate, COUNT(*) AS fileNumber FROM ecm_busi_info ebi LEFT JOIN ecm_file_info efi ON ebi.busi_id = efi.busi_id
efi.create_time BETWEEN #{ecmStatisticsDTO.startDate} AND #{ecmStatisticsDTO.endDate}
AND efi.create_user IN
#{item}
GROUP BY efi.create_user, TO_CHAR(efi.create_time,
'YYYY-MM-DD'
'YYYY-MM'
'YYYY'
'YYYY-MM-DD'
), efi.create_user_name, ebi.app_code

select info.busi_id, info.busi_no, info.app_code, info.right_ver, info.tree_type, info.create_user, info.create_time, info.update_user, info.update_time, info.is_deleted, info.create_user_name, info.update_user_name, info.org_code, info.org_name, app.app_name as appTypeName, app.equipment_id from ecm_busi_info info left join ecm_app_def app on info.app_code = app.app_code
info.is_deleted = 0
and info.busi_id in
#{item}
